name: Z Squared Inc.
business: Coeptis Therapeutics Holdings, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical and technology company. Its biopharmaceutical division develops cell therapy platforms for cancer, autoimmune, and infectious diseases. Its technology division offers AI-powered marketing software and robotic process automation tools.

exposures.sentence: The biopharmaceutical division focuses on developing innovative cell therapy platforms for cancer, autoimmune, and infectious diseases.
CD38-Diagnostic is an in vitro diagnostic tool to analyze if cancer patients might be appropriate candidates for anti-CD38 mAb therapy.
This division features AI-powered marketing software and robotic process automation tools designed to optimize business processes and improve overall efficiency.

catalysts.event: Merger with Z Squared, Inc. to close
catalysts.sentence: The Merger is expected to close in the second quarter 2026.

catalysts.event: Planned clinical trials for GEAR-NK product candidate
catalysts.sentence: No human clinical trials have been conducted for GEAR-NK but are planned for 2027 or later.

tamClaims.claim: Global multiple myeloma market was $28.42B in 2024 and is expected to reach $47.04B by 2031.
tamClaims.sentence: The global multiple myeloma market was $28.42B in 2024 and is expected to reach $47.04B by 2031 [Source: Data Bridge Market Research].

tamClaims.claim: CAR T-cell therapy market size expected to reach $20.56 billion by 2029 (from $1.96 billion in 2021), CAGR 31.6%.
tamClaims.sentence: By way of market size, according to Polaris Market Research, the CAR T-cell therapy market size is expected to reach $20.56 billion by 2029 (from $1.96 billion in 2021), representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 31.6% during the forecast period from 2022 to 2029.
